data.title: Hyundai Motor Group co-hosted the Hydrogen Council Global CEO Summit in Seoul from Dec 2-4, enhancing Korea's role in the hydrogen industry.
data.description: From December 2 to 4, Hyundai Motor Group partnered in organizing the Hydrogen Council Global CEO Summit held in Seoul, Korea. The summit aimed to establish the strategic path for the worldwide hydrogen sector. This event highlighted Korea's pivotal role in hydrogen innovation and showcased Hyundai Motor Group's prominent position in driving developments in this field.

data.title: Shipsy appoints Rolf van Oostrom as VP of Europe to drive growth; key move for supply chain and logistics tech.
data.description: In Gurugram, India on December 4, 2025, Shipsy, a prominent company offering AI-native solutions for the supply chain and logistics technology sector, revealed the selection of Rolf van Oostrom as the Vice President of Europe. This decision signifies a strategic move for the company as Rolf takes on this crucial role to enhance operations and drive growth in the European market.

data.title: Broadridge's DLR platform processed $368B in average daily trade volumes in Nov, up 466% YoY, showing growth in tokenized settlement.
data.description: In December 4, 2025, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. reported significant growth in their Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) platform, with November 2025 Average Daily Volume (ADV) showing a remarkable 466% increase compared to the previous year. This surge underscores the swift acceptance of tokenized settlement mechanisms. Broadridge, a leading global Fintech company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol BR, revealed the impressive performance of their platform in handling transactions within the financial ecosystem.

data.title: Cornish Metals shareholders approved plan of arrangement at Special Meeting on Dec 3, 2025.
data.description: Cornish Metals has successfully obtained shareholder approval for the plan of arrangement during the Special Meeting held on December 3, 2025. The approval signifies a significant milestone for the company, with a majority of shareholders voting in favor of the arrangement. This outcome demonstrates strong support from investors and stakeholders as the company continues to advance its strategic initiatives. The successful vote paves the way for Cornish Metals to proceed with the planned arrangement, marking a key development in its corporate trajectory.

data.title: Vodafone's subsidiary, Vodacom, to acquire additional 20% of Safaricom, consolidating control to 55%. Kenya's top telecom operator.
data.description: Vodacom, a subsidiary of Vodafone Group operating in Africa, is set to increase its stake in Safaricom, the top telecom company in Kenya. The acquisition will raise Vodacom's ownership from the current 35% to 55%, signifying a notable 20% increase in their share of Safaricom. This move strengthens Vodafone Group's position in the African telecommunications market and solidifies their presence in Kenya.
Putin stated that he does not want to return to the G8.

data.title: Fortanix partners with HPE and NVIDIA for secure AI in factories using Armet AI, HPE ProLiant Compute DL380a Gen12 servers, and NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 GPUs.
data.description: Fortanix® Inc. unveiled that their Armet AI platform is now compatible with HPE’s AI solutions, enabling secure infrastructure and accelerated computing for scalable, production-ready AI. The platform can operate on HPE ProLiant Compute DL380a Gen12 servers alongside NVIDIA RTX PRO™ 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs. This collaboration allows global enterprises to develop and execute secure, scalable AI workloads both on-premises and in the cloud.

data.title: High-conviction pick Lululemon faces De Minimis test in Q3, but bulls predict a 60% surge in 2 years. Michael Burry reveals LULU as part of his four stock picks. Management warns of upcoming financial hurdle due to new tariff rates. Experts believe LULU is undervalued and could reach $300.
data.description: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) is currently facing a mix of bullish and bearish sentiment ahead of its upcoming third-quarter earnings report. The company has been identified as a high-conviction contrarian pick by renowned investor Michael Burry, who believes that the recent sell-off is merely cosmetic and sees potential in the stock. However, LULU is also confronted with immediate financial challenges, with the management warning about the impact of new tariff rates and the removal of the "de minimis" duty exemption in the third quarter, which could strain profit margins. Burry, in a recent post, disclosed LULU as one of his four favored stocks. Despite these obstacles, there are experts who argue that LULU is currently undervalued and has the potential to bounce back, possibly reaching $300 in the future. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ross Gerber criticizes prediction markets as illegal sports betting, particularly targeting platform Kalshi due to violating state gaming laws. Marketed as futures contracts, he argues they should be shut down. Sports betting dominates Kalshi volume.
data.description: Renowned investor Ross Gerber criticized prediction markets likening them to illegal sports betting, pointing out that platforms like Kalshi are operating as unlicensed sports betting operations that violate state gaming laws. Gerber, the CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management, argued that these markets are allowed to exist despite being based on bets that should be classified as futures contracts, thus bypassing state laws in regions like California where sports betting remains illegal. Gerber's remarks came amid a legal crackdown on such platforms, with sports betting dominating the volume on Kalshi.

data.title: "5th Understanding China event in Guangzhou showcases youth perspectives on China in video format; held at Yuexiu Int'l Conf. Center."
data.description: A ceremony titled "China in the Eyes of the Young" was held at the Yuexiu International Conference Center in Guangzhou, China on December 2, 2025. This event, part of the 2025 Understanding China Conference, featured an international short video screening and award ceremony. The ceremony aimed to showcase perspectives on China from young individuals.
